mnemonics.title: Transaction Pattern
mnemonics.content: BSE: Begin, Successful, End - the three SQLiteDatabase methods called in order: beginTransaction(), setTransactionSuccessful(), endTransaction()

mnemonics.title: ACID Properties
mnemonics.content: A Cat Is Durable - Atomicity (all or nothing), Consistency (valid state), Isolation (no interference), Durability (persists after crash)

mnemonics.title: Transaction Best Practices
mnemonics.content: FSCBR: Finally block always, Short transactions, Check results, Background thread, Room for modern apps

mnemonics.title: Performance Rule
mnemonics.content: 25x Rule: Batch operations inside a transaction are roughly 25 times faster than individual auto-committed operations.
